subject: (no subject)
body:
If you need to reach Ira at home, his no is 718-677-8544

My home is 973-597-1165.  Cell is 862-485-6315.

I didn't want to put too much detail in the email, so if you want to talk, call any time.

For what its worth, hope you are doing ok.

Hope you manage to find some rest on thanksgiving.  Call me when it is convenient for you so I know how to proceed with the trade on Friday.

Darren

Sent from my iPhone
